controls.title: CWE-20
controls.description: Root cause � agent inputs not validated before entering model context; indirect injection content not treated as untrusted; Tool parameters generated by LLM not validated against safe ranges before execution; Content entering agent memory not validated before write

controls.control_id: Improper Neutralisation of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component
controls.title: CWE-74
controls.description: Instruction elements in processed content not neutralised before agent reasoning

controls.title: CWE-693
controls.description: Safety and goal-verification controls bypassed through injection; Behavioural monitoring and detection mechanisms bypassed by rogue agent

controls.title: CWE-441
controls.description: Agent acts as a proxy executing attacker instructions against backend systems; Compromised tool acting as malicious intermediary in agent workflow

controls.control_id: Externally Controlled Reference to a Resource in Another Sphere
controls.title: CWE-610
controls.description: Agent retrieves and acts on externally controlled content (RAG, email, tool returns) without adequate validation

controls.title: CWE-284
controls.description: Agent can invoke tools it should not have access to; tool parameters not range-validated; Vector store and memory databases with insufficient access controls permitting unauthorised writes; Rogue agent exceeds its permitted access scope � no scope enforcement

controls.title: CWE-862
controls.description: No authorisation check before irreversible tool invocations; human confirmation not required

controls.control_id: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
controls.title: CWE-434
controls.description: Analogy: agent accepts and executes tool payloads without content validation

controls.control_id: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources
controls.title: CWE-913
controls.description: MCP descriptors and tool specifications are dynamically loaded code resources � modification not controlled

controls.title: CWE-250
controls.description: Agent runs with broader credentials than its task requires; NHI-5 over-privilege

controls.title: CWE-522
controls.description: Agent credentials stored in cleartext memory, logs, config, or tool payloads

controls.title: CWE-312
controls.description: Credentials and tokens not encrypted at rest in agent memory or configuration

controls.title: CWE-798
controls.description: Agent credentials hardcoded in prompts or source code

controls.title: CWE-613
controls.description: Long-lived agent credentials without expiry or rotation � NHI-7

controls.control_id: Download of Code Without Integrity Check
controls.title: CWE-494
controls.description: Agent tool components and MCP servers loaded without signature verification

controls.control_id: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
controls.title: CWE-829
controls.description: MCP servers and plugins from external registries loaded into agent execution context

controls.title: CWE-506
controls.description: Model weights and tool components containing hidden backdoor functionality; Rogue behaviour may result from backdoored model or component

controls.title: CWE-1357
controls.description: Agent dependency on third-party MCP servers without security assessment

controls.control_id: Improper Control of Generation of Code
controls.title: CWE-94
controls.description: Agent generates and executes code without adequate static analysis or sandbox

controls.control_id: Improper Neutralisation of Special Elements in OS Command
controls.title: CWE-78
controls.description: LLM-generated code containing shell commands executed without sanitisation

controls.control_id: Improper Neutralisation of Special Elements in Command
controls.title: CWE-77
controls.description: LLM output used directly in command context

controls.control_id: Improper Neutralisation of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code
controls.title: CWE-95
controls.description: Eval of LLM-generated code

controls.title: CWE-676
controls.description: Agent uses exec(), eval(), subprocess without validation

controls.control_id: Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data with Trusted Data
controls.title: CWE-349
controls.description: Agent memory store accepts writes from untrusted sources alongside trusted operational knowledge

controls.title: CWE-345
controls.description: Memory content not integrity-verified before storage or retrieval

controls.control_id: Multiple Releases of Same Resource or Handle
controls.title: CWE-1341
controls.description: Memory TTL not enforced � entries persist beyond intended lifetime

controls.title: CWE-287
controls.description: A2A channels without mutual authentication � agents accept messages from any sender

controls.title: CWE-294
controls.description: Replay attacks on A2A channels without nonce-based replay protection

controls.title: CWE-319
controls.description: A2A messages containing sensitive context transmitted without encryption

controls.title: CWE-346
controls.description: Agent does not verify that A2A messages originate from the claimed sender; User cannot determine whether advice originates from AI or human � no origin verification

controls.control_id: Improper Enforcement of Message Integrity During Transmission
controls.title: CWE-924
controls.description: A2A message integrity not cryptographically verified

controls.title: CWE-400
controls.description: Agent resource consumption not bounded � enables exhaustion propagation across cluster

controls.control_id: Improper Check or Handling of Exceptional Conditions
controls.title: CWE-703
controls.description: Agent failures not caught and handled � exception propagates to downstream agents

controls.title: CWE-755
controls.description: Cascade fails because upstream agents do not handle failure conditions gracefully

controls.title: CWE-730
controls.description: Regex-based input processing causing runaway computation propagating through pipeline

controls.title: CWE-674
controls.description: Recursive agent calls without depth limits enabling stack exhaustion cascade

controls.title: CWE-183
controls.description: System accepts human-like agent output without disclosure requirements

controls.control_id: User Interface Misrepresentation of Critical Information
controls.title: CWE-451
controls.description: Agent advisory output not clearly distinguished from authoritative system information in UI

controls.control_id: Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel
controls.title: CWE-940
controls.description: User cannot verify the agent is operating under its stated configuration

controls.control_id: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorised Actor
controls.title: CWE-200
controls.description: System prompt and agent configuration not protected � extraction enables targeted trust exploitation

controls.title: CWE-799
controls.description: Rogue agent evades detection by maintaining normal action frequency while biasing recommendations

controls.title: CWE-276
controls.description: Agent deployed with broader permissions than needed � amplifies rogue blast radius
